name: Sumo Logic, Inc.
description: Sumo Logic, Inc. is a leading provider of a cloud-native software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform that enables organizations to gain real-time insights from their machine data. Founded in 2010 and headquartered in Redwood City, California, the company specializes in security, observability, and data analytics. By leveraging advanced machine learning and artificial intelligence, Sumo Logic helps businesses monitor, troubleshoot, and secure their digital infrastructures, ensuring reliability and performance across complex, modern cloud environments. The company serves a diverse global customer base, empowering teams to make data-driven decisions and proactively manage their digital operations.
